creator: ebrandi@fugspbr.org
text:
Hi,

The FreeBSD Brazilian Portuguese Documentation Project (http://doc.fug.com.br), finished translation of fdp-primer book.

I tried to submit this translated book using send-pr command, but for some weird reason all servers where i tried to use send-pr failed to delivery e-mail to FreeBSD-gnats-submit@freebsd.org due IP getting blocked on FreeBSD.Org MX :/

And im also unable to send it using web interface because my compressed/uuencoded file exceed 100kb limit that are allowed by this interface.

Than, my last option was make this file available for download from one of my webservers :)

Please download it from url:

http://server05.ebrandi.eti.br/pt_BR/books/fdp-primer-pt_BR.ISO8859-1.tgz

This file must be uncompressed inside head/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/books directory, patch file must be moved to head/pt_BR.ISO8859-1/share and applied with "patch -Np0 < pt_BR.ISO8859-1_share_sgml.patch"

Thks

Edson Brandi
